thread: When people ask how Ferni was built, the honest answer is: with help. A lot of help. From AI. 🌿
The irony isn't lost on us. We're building AI life coaches, and to build them? We're coached by AI every day during development.
This is what we mean when we say Ferni is "AI-native." Most companies use AI as a tool—chatbots, autocomplete. Useful add-ons. For us, AI isn't a layer. It's foundational.

When we design Ferni's memory system, we talk with AI first. Not for code—for thinking. "How would a good friend decide what's worth remembering?" AI doesn't give answers. It helps us ask better questions.
Here's what nobody tells you: AI doesn't replace the hard decisions. It clarifies them. What should Ferni care about? When should it stay silent? Those choices are still human.
We could have quietly used AI and marketed Ferni as purely human-built. We chose transparency. It's honest. It's the future. And we're proud of what we've built together.
Want to see what this collaboration produces? Try talking to Ferni—no signup required. [LINK] #AI #BuildingInPublic
